name: Duane Terrence Loynes Jr.
party: No Qualified Party Preference (American Solidarity Party)
background: Member of the American Solidarity Party, which emphasizes human dignity from conception to natural death.
statement: The American Solidarity Party platform emphasizes the need to uphold the dignity of the human person from conception to natural death, which includes the unborn, the mother in the crisis pregnancy, the immigrant, documented or undocumented, children at risk of being deprived of their mother or father, the elderly or sick who are at risk of being pressured to end their own lives, the worker struggling to support the family or to buy a home, the homeless person who does not have shelter and is estranged from family.

positions.economy: Support for workers and homebuyers; support for homeless individuals
positions.housing: Shelter for homeless; support for home-buying workers
positions.healthcare: Dignity for the elderly and sick; against euthanasia/assisted suicide pressure
positions.immigration: Dignity for all immigrants, documented and undocumented
positions.abortion: Pro-life from conception; also support for mother in crisis pregnancy
positions.socialJustice: Human dignity for all from conception to natural death
